content.en:
Guheng Mountain.

Ye Tian is back, and this time he has obtained so many source stones from the other side, which is enough for him to condense the golden blood and golden bones of the other side, and even improve his cultivation.

"Start refining the source stones on the other side!"

One after another, the source stones of the other side were absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, and integrated into the heart of the other side, which was used to refine the immeasurable blood, and the last immeasurable blood was quenched into the golden blood of the other side.

this day.

Rumble!!!

The immeasurable blood in Ye Tian's whole body has completely turned into the golden blood of the other side, and his physical body is nourished by the golden blood of the other side, and it is rapidly increasing.

And.

The golden body on the other side has the blessing of the golden blood on the other side, and the power is even more powerful!

"The next step is to let all the immeasurable bones in the whole body evolve into the golden bones of the other side!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He took out more Source Stones from the other side and began to cultivate.

With the help of a large number of source stones and hearts on the other side, one after another immeasurable bones gradually turned into one golden bone after another.

Of course.

Let the immeasurable bone become the golden bone on the other side, the difficulty will definitely be greater, and the source stones on the other side will be consumed more.

However, this time, he had obtained too many source stones from the other side, so he could definitely turn all the immeasurable bones in his body into golden bones from the other side.

Time flies.

Dozens of primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's immeasurable bones have all turned into golden bones on the other side.

"Very good, the golden blood on the other side, the golden bones on the other side, my physical body is stronger, with the golden body on the other side, the combat effectiveness will be stronger!"

"Now, I need to complete the Seven Bone Transformation of the Golden Bone on the Other Side, and I can be promoted to the Seven Bone Transformation Realm!"

Subsequently.

He began to use the source stone of the other side to directly refine the golden bone of the other side, so that the golden bone of the other side completed seven bone transformations.

When cultivating and improving his cultivation, he did not forget to let other copies of the body study the method of creating the golden body on the other side, so that the other parts of the body could complete the transformation of the golden body on the other side.

More than 600 years later.

Ye Tian was finally about to break through to the seventh bone transformation realm.

At this time, he was already one step away from the seventh bone transformation realm.

"I've fallen into a bottleneck, and I have to create a magic technique on the other side, so as to strengthen the power of the origin on the other side, so as to break the shackles and be promoted to the seventh bone transformation realm. "

Subsequently.

It took him some time to successfully create a supernatural technique on the other side.

In fact, he had been creating another supernatural technique on the other side, which was why he had succeeded in creating it so quickly.

This time, the magic technique he created is called the Void Insight Technique, which is a magic technique with tracking, locking, and snooping, and belongs to the auxiliary class of the other side's magic power.

Although this kind of supernatural power cannot increase combat power, it is very helpful in some cases.

Therefore, it took him so long to create it, which is also helpful for the future.

Besides, no matter what kind of supernatural power the other side is, as long as it can help break through, then it's fine.

Rumble!!!

The Void Insight Technique was integrated into the body, causing the power of the other side of the origin in the body to skyrocket, enveloping the whole body.

At this time.

He slammed the bottleneck with all his might, easily breaking through the bottleneck and stepping into the realm of seven bone transformations.

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The other side level genius of the seventh-time bone transformation realm is equivalent to the top eight-time bone transformation realm primeval-level genius.

What's more, he can be called the top among the geniuses on the other side.

Therefore, with his strength, even if he encountered an ancient-level genius in the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, even if he couldn't beat it, he would be able to save his life.

With such strength, as long as you don't encounter the Origin Realm in the land of eternity, you can go sideways.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian has made a new breakthrough in the golden body transformation on the other side, and half of his body can complete the golden body transformation on the other side.

As a result, his strength has skyrocketed now!

......

The Realm of Eternal Life.

This is one of the seventy-two eastern regions, and it is not too far from the Bloody Domain.

On this day, however, the realm of eternal life underwent a great change.

Click!

An area collapsed, and a golden humanoid skeleton fell from a plane of time.

This golden skeleton is not simple, exuding an incomparably terrifying aura, some nearby creatures were directly shattered, and even the creatures in the world were instantly turned into pieces, all of which could not withstand the power of this golden skeleton.

Immediately.

A Origin Realm of the Eternal Realm appeared, and he wanted to take away this golden skeleton for the first time.

However.

This golden skeleton can still move, and it can be shot directly.

Rumble!!!!

A Venerable Origin Realm was severely damaged.

In desperation, they jointly sealed the area and then called for help.

Soon, a Origin Realm from other regions came here, and even the Lord of Chaos came.

When the Lord of Chaos arrived, many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors breathed a sigh of relief.

At this time, the Lord of the Eternal Realm of Luo Bi asked, "Lord of Peace, do you know what the situation is with that golden skeleton, it obviously has no life, it should be a corpse bone, why can it still move, and it can burst out with such a powerful attack?"

The Lord of Chaos looked through the seal and observed.

After a long time.

Only then did the Lord of Chaos speak: "If I am not wrong in my guess, this should be the skeleton of a certain Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, the other party is indeed dead, but this skeleton should have given birth to a new consciousness, thus controlling this skeleton." "

"How is this possible, to be able to let such an being die, there shouldn't be a new consciousness to be born, so I've heard of such a thing!"

He also came here.

The other Origin Realms also expressed their incomprehension, and thus saw this kind of thing.

At this time, the Lord of Chaos said: "I haven't seen it either, but it should have something to do with the special nature of this skeleton, you should be able to see that this skeleton is composed of golden bones on the other side, and the other party should be like me, realizing the complete embodiment of the golden body on the other side." Not only that, but his golden incarnation on the other side is more perfect, perfect to the extreme. I realized the golden body of the other side by creating a large number of golden bodies on the other side, so that the pieces of the body area can complete the golden body of the other side. There is no special connection between these methods of the Golden Body on the other side, and there are even some differences and fragmentation. However, this Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, the golden body transformation on the other side should be a method of the golden body on the other side, and directly let the whole body complete the golden body transformation on the other side, this is the most perfect method of the golden body on the other side!"

"I see!"

Many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors understood.

At this time, the Lord of Chaos said: "We can subdue him first, and then comprehend the imprint on his bones, and perhaps hope to comprehend the method of intact the golden body contained in his body." The method of the golden body on the other side cannot be inherited, but the other party's skeleton is very special, so it can be used for inheritance, and this skeleton alone is a priceless treasure!"
